title: austrogramme asplenioides
intro: Austrogramme asplenioides, also known as the Asplenioid's Austrogramme, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical Asia, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as supporting the immune system and acting as an antioxidant. Austrogramme asplenioides is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
